info.description: Backend API for the SITCON Camp 2026 game.
info.title: Camp 2026 Game API

get.description: Returns an admin-only operational dashboard with player, inventory, match, and activity statistics.

post.description: Uses the ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variable to create an admin session cookie.
User-facing endpoint. Validates the issued game URL token, rotates it, and writes the fresh session token to the camp2026_auth cookie.
Clears the camp2026_auth cookie for the current browser session.

Set-Cookie.description: camp2026_auth=; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Max-Age=0

get.description: Lists all collectible item definitions.
Lists all collectible sitone definitions.

post.description: Consumes the recipe inputs and grants recipe outputs to the authenticated player.

get.description: Lists enabled fusion recipes and whether the authenticated player has enough materials.
Confirms the HTTP process is alive and the database is reachable.
Lists team or player rankings by sitone count, then open power.
Returns read-only item and sitone inventory for a leaderboard player.
Lists players in a ranked team with their inventory totals.

post.description: Creates a two-player quiz match room for the authenticated player.
Creates a two-player quiz match room against the system-controlled computer opponent.

get.description: Returns whether computer battles are currently enabled for players.

post.description: Joins a waiting two-player quiz match room by invite code.

get.description: Returns the current waiting or active match for the authenticated participant.
Returns the current match state for a participant. Active matches reveal current-round answers only during the reveal phase.

post.description: Accepts the authenticated player's answer for the current question. Correctness is revealed to both players when the round enters the reveal phase.

get.description: Streams match state changes for participants with Server-Sent Events.

put.description: Updates the authenticated player's sitone loadout for a waiting match and saves it as the player's default loadout.

post.description: Marks the authenticated player ready. The match starts automatically when both players are ready.

get.description: Returns the authenticated player's home page summary, resource counts, and team rank by sitone count and open power.
Returns items owned by the authenticated player with catalog definitions.
Returns completed quiz matches joined by the authenticated player. Waiting and active matches are not returned.
Returns the authenticated player's QR code identifier for client-side QR rendering. This identifier is not a login credential.
get.summary: Get current player QR code identifier

get.description: Returns the authenticated player's default sitone loadout.

put.description: Updates the authenticated player's default sitone loadout.

get.description: Returns sitones owned by the authenticated player with catalog definitions.
Returns the authenticated player's profile summary, team, and open power total.

post.description: Staff-only endpoint. Resolves a player QR code identifier into a player summary without exposing auth credentials.

get.description: Lists purchasable and enabled item definitions.
Returns one purchasable and enabled item definition.

post.description: Purchases one enabled shop item, deducts open power, and adds it to the current player's item bag.

get.description: Staff-only endpoint. Searches players by nickname or player ID for reward targeting.

post.description: Staff-only endpoint. Grants one sitone or item to a player selected by player ID or QR code identifier, and records the staff grant.
post.summary: Grant sitone or item as staff

description.example: 冒險背包，可用於小石合成。
修 bug、分享解法、完成技術任務。
牠把貼紙、名牌、備用線材都塞進包包，準備在 2026 營隊裡探索下一個任務。

AuthCookieAuth.description: User auth cookie. Send as `Cookie: camp2026_auth=<base64url-auth-token>`.
AuthCookieAuth.name: Cookie
